topic: offline preview bundle persistence / audit manifest implementation review

initial_blockers_fixed.blocker: Symlinked parent path rejection was incomplete when runs_root was resolved before checking the original repo/runs path.
initial_blockers_fixed.fix: Added unresolved lexical parent symlink checks before resolving runs_root, rejected symlinked repo roots, and kept resolved containment/symlink checks. Added symlinked runs parent regression test, skipped only when OS symlink creation is unavailable.

initial_blockers_fixed.blocker: Persistence filesystem failures could raise exceptions instead of returning structured deny, and could leave partial temp state.
initial_blockers_fixed.fix: Persistence now cleans .preview.tmp and empty run_dir on exception; build_dry_run_plan catches persistence exceptions and returns deny. Added simulated write-failure no-traceback/no-preview regression test.

final_safety_assessment.persistence_scope: data-only JSON artifacts under repo-local runs/<run_id>/preview after all gates allow

validation_observed_by_review: python -m unittest scripts.test_module_runner: 32 tests OK, 1 skipped
python -m unittest discover -s scripts: 150 tests OK, 3 skipped
git diff --check: no whitespace errors; LF/CRLF warnings only
non_blocking_notes: LF/CRLF warnings are not a safety blocker.
On persistence failure, in-memory previews may still exist while verdict is deny and preview_manifest is absent; this is acceptable for the current safety goal.
